fields.value: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> value that specifies how Vulkan image components are mapped for YCbCr conversion.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the component swizzle mapping for the YCbCr conversion.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields of both values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the sampler filter must match the chroma filter for this conversion; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sampler filter must match the chroma filter.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if linear chroma filtering is supported; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether linear filtering is supported for chroma reconstruction.
